personal-info: Fullstack Engineer with {{year}}+ years of experience building scalable web applications, backend services, and distributed systems across banking, enterprise, and SaaS environments. Specialized in Node.js, TypeScript, Golang, and React/Next.js, with strong expertise in microservices architecture, asynchronous processing, caching strategies, API design, and database optimization. Proven ability to deliver reliable, maintainable, and high-performance solutions while collaborating across cross-functional teams.
